# Test EPUBs

## The Lighthouse Keeper / El Farero (EN/ES)

- `the_lighthouse_keeper_en.epub` — *The Lighthouse Keeper's Inheritance* (English), 10 chapters
- `el_farero_es.epub` — *El Farero* (Spanish), 10 chapters

AI-generated test book with parallel EN/ES text. Used by the EPUB Combiner for testing alignment, parsing, and generation.

## Don Quixote (EN/ES)

- `donquixote-en.epub` — *The History and Adventures of the Renowned Don Quixote* (English translation), 47 chapters
- `donquixote-es.epub` — *Don Quijote* (original Spanish), 33 chapters

Both Don Quixote files are sourced from [Project Gutenberg](https://www.gutenberg.org/) and are in the **public domain** in the United States, Spain, and Europe. Miguel de Cervantes Saavedra died in 1616, making these works public domain worldwide under the Berne Convention (life + 70 years).

- US: Published before 1929; public domain under US copyright law
- Spain/EU: Author died 1616; well beyond the life + 70 year term
- Project Gutenberg license: https://www.gutenberg.org/policy/license.html
